info.title: My API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for my Next.js app

BearerAuth.description: Enter your JWT token from the login endpoint

get.description: Exchanges the OAuth code returned by Google for a session. Returns access and refresh tokens.
Returns a Google OAuth URL. Open this URL in a browser or webview. After authentication, Google will redirect to /api/auth/callback with a code parameter.

parameters.name: redirect_to
parameters.description: URL to redirect to after successful authentication (defaults to the callback endpoint)

url.description: Open this URL in a browser to authenticate with Google

access_token.description: JWT access token for API requests

refresh_token.description: Refresh token to get new access tokens

400.description: Bad request - missing or invalid credentials
Bad request - invalid input or user already exists

500.description: Server error - failed to create account

get.summary: Gets all the categories of a book

200.description: List of categories for the book with translated names

categoryTranslations.description: Contains one translation for the requested language

get.summary: Gets a book translation by language
Gets all translations of a book

200.description: List of book translations with language info

get.summary: Gets all the books from a category by language

200.description: List of books in the category with translation for the given language

bookTranslations.description: Contains one translation for the requested language, sorted by title

get.description: Returns paginated books with their translations, pages, and categories

parameters.name: language_id
parameters.description: Filter books that have a translation in this language

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by title (case-insensitive partial match). Scoped to language_id if also provided.

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: Filter books belonging to this category

post.summary: Create a book with pages and upload photos (admin only)
post.description:
Creates a book with a language-specific title and one page per entry.
Each page has its own text and optionally its own photo.

Send as `multipart/form-data`. Page metadata is passed as a JSON string
in the `pages` field. Page photos are uploaded as separate file fields
named `page_photo_{page_number}` (e.g. `page_photo_1`, `page_photo_2`).

category_ids.description: JSON array of category IDs, e.g. "[1, 2]"

book_photo.description: Cover photo for the book (JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF, max 5MB)

pages.description:
JSON array of page objects. Each object must have `page_number` (integer)
and `text_content` (string).

page_photo_{page_number}.description:
Optional photo for a specific page. Replace `{page_number}` with the
actual page number, e.g. `page_photo_1`, `page_photo_2`.
Accepts JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF, max 5MB.

400.description: Bad request - missing required fields, invalid JSON, or invalid file

get.description: Returns category details with translations in all languages

put.description: Replaces the category photo in R2 storage

photo.description: New category photo (JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF, max 5MB)

400.description: Bad request - invalid file type or size

delete.description: Deletes a category and its photo from storage. Cannot delete if category is in use.

400.description: Cannot delete - category is in use

error.example: Cannot delete category - it is being used
